title: The Fourth Tenant - Lease Fragment Reconstruction - HOST Shard Card
prompt: Story: The Fourth Tenant (the-fourth-tenant) | Hook: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: EERIE | Location: Flood-district prewar apartment block | Villain: The Landlord of Rooms That Move | Villain worldview: People accept impossible rooms when paperwork feels safe. | Motifs: door chains, wet plaster, rent slips. Create shard card for holder HOST. Content brief: Host receives a redacted PDF with clause numbering intact.. Ensure it can stand alone but becomes decisive when combined with other shards.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
